kw.msg: {'page': 1, 'per_page': 6, 'total': 12, 'total_pages': 2, 'data': [{'id': 1, 'email': 'george.bluth@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'George', 'last_name': 'Bluth', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/1-image.jpg'}, {'id': 2, 'email': 'janet.weaver@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'Janet', 'last_name': 'Weaver', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/2-image.jpg'}, {'id': 3, 'email': 'emma.wong@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'Emma', 'last_name': 'Wong', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/3-image.jpg'}, {'id': 4, 'email': 'eve.holt@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'Eve', 'last_name': 'Holt', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/4-image.jpg'}, {'id': 5, 'email': 'charles.morris@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'Charles', 'last_name': 'Morris', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/5-image.jpg'}, {'id': 6, 'email': 'tracey.ramos@api.testacademy.fr', 'first_name': 'Tracey', 'last_name': 'Ramos', 'avatar': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/img/faces/6-image.jpg'}], 'support': {'url': 'https://api.testacademy.fr/#support-heading', 'text': 'To keep TestAcademy free, contributions towards server costs are appreciated!'}}

suite.stat: Tests Api.00 Requête GET HTML Google
Tests Api.05 Requete GET User ById TestAcademy
Tests Api.06 Requete GET Unknown TestAcademy
Tests Api.07 Requete GET Unknown ById TestAcademy
